sections.paragraph:
ἀκάνθινος, η, ον (Hdt. et al.; pap) thorny (so Is 34:13) ἀ. στέφανος Mk 15:17; J 19:5; GPt 3:8. S. HStJHart, JTS n.s. 3, ’52, 66–75; CBonner, HTR 46, ’53, 47f; EGoodenough and CWelles, ibid. 46, ’53, 241f.

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

GPt GPt = Gospel of Peter—List 1

JTS JTS = Journal of Theological Studies—List 6

n.s. n.s. = new series (also used to render Neue Folge)

HTR HTR = Harvard Theological Review—List 6

ibid. ibid. = ibidem (in the same book or passage)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 34
